checks.description: read_data must never assume unknown (X) or high‑impedance (Z) values during edge stimulus.
checks.pass_condition: At all sampled cycles while edge_001 stimulus is active, read_data is a defined 0/1 value (no X or Z).
checks.trigger_condition: When the edge_001 plan applies boundary‑value patterns.

checks.description: read_data must equal the data written to the same address when a read follows a write.
checks.pass_condition: If write_en was asserted with write_addr = A and write_data = D, and subsequently read_en is asserted with read_addr = A, then read_data equals D.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 plan performs a write followed by a readback of the same address.

checks.description: read_data must be cleared to zero after reset deassertion and remain stable before any functional operation.
checks.pass_condition: Following the release of rst_n, read_data settles to 0 and does not change until the first non‑reset operation is applied.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset is asserted and then released according to the plan's reset_001 case.
